description: An HR administrator needs to launch the annual performance review cycle for the entire company.

nodes.task_description: Generate the performance review forms for all eligible employees in the performance management system.

expected_outcome.value: Admin successfully creates review forms for all active employees.

nodes.task_description: Send a company-wide communication announcing the start of the review cycle and the deadlines.

expected_outcome.value: Admin drafts and sends the announcement email.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the completion status of self-assessments and manager reviews via a dashboard.

expected_outcome.value: Admin checks the dashboard to track progress against deadlines.
